title: A Process Harness for Uplifting Legacy Workflows to Agentic BPM: Design and Realization in CUGA FLO
abstract: arXiv:2606.27188v1 Announce Type: new  Abstract: We introduce the process harness, a new mechanism for uplifting legacy workflows into Agentic Business Process Management (Agentic BPM) without replacing the underlying workflow engine. A process harness places a policy-governed agentic layer around a deterministic workflow engine, intercepting designated control points to contribute reasoning, adaptation, and oversight while the engine retains structural authority over the process. To define the process harness rigorously, we develop the Task-Decision-Flow (TDF) model, specifying both its data schema and its execution semantics. TDF decomposes LLM reasoning across three policy-governed agent types: a TaskAgent for knowledge-intensive task execution, a DecisionAgent for per-case gateway routing, and a FlowAgent that governs runtime flow adaptation through a principled hook mechanism. Each agent reasons within an explicit policy drawn from the process FRAME, the aggregate policy set gover

translated_title: 一种将遗留工作流提升为智能体业务流程管理的流程夹具：在CUGA FLO中的设计与实现
translated_abstract: 我们引入了流程夹具这一新机制，用于在不替换底层工作流引擎的情况下，将遗留工作流提升为智能体业务流程管理。流程夹具在确定性工作流引擎周围放置一个由策略治理的智能体层，拦截指定的控制点以贡献推理、适应和监督能力，同时引擎保留对流程的结构性权威。为了严格定义流程夹具，我们开发了任务-决策-流模型，规定了其数据模式和执行语义。TDF模型将大语言模型推理分解为三种由策略治理的智能体类型：TaskAgent负责知识密集型任务执行，DecisionAgent负责按案例进行网关路由，FlowAgent通过原则性的钩子机制治理运行时流程适应。每个智能体在从流程FRAME（即聚合策略集）中提取的显式策略下进行推理。
tldr: 本文提出了一种称为“流程夹具”的新机制，通过在不替换原有工作流引擎的前提下添加策略驱动的智能体层，实现将遗留工作流提升为智能体业务流程管理，并设计了任务-决策-流模型来严格定义其数据模式和执行语义。
en_tdlr: This paper introduces a "process harness" mechanism that elevates legacy workflows to Agentic BPM by adding a policy-driven agentic layer without replacing the underlying engine, and designs the Task-Decision-Flow model to rigorously define its data schema and execution semantics.
